description: Retries fire immediately and in lockstep with no backoff or jitter, amplifying a partial outage into a thundering herd.
body: Failure mode: on failure the client retries in a tight loop (or fixed delay) with no jitter and no cap, so when a dependency degrades every client hammers it simultaneously, multiplying load and preventing recovery. Detection signals: request volume to a failing dependency spikes instead of dropping; synchronized retry bursts; no backoff/jitter in the retry code; the dependency cannot recover while clients retry. Do not retry without capped exponential backoff and jitter. Safer fallback: cap attempts and total time, use exponential backoff with full jitter, respect Retry-After, add a circuit breaker, and load-test that a degraded dependency does not see amplified traffic.
